sys_app.name: Generative AI Controller BYOK Autoconfigurator
sys_app.description: One-click wizard to configure Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) for the Generative AI Controller. Supports Azure OpenAI, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, and IBM watsonx. Eliminates manual credential exchange, endpoint setup, and AI Control Tower navigation.
sys_app.short_description: BYOK autoconfig for Australia AI stack
